creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: skreuzer
Date: Wed Jan  2 23:15:32 2013
New Revision: 309848
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309848

Log:
  Install lsdistcc
  
  PR:		ports/174314
  Submitted by:	4721@hushmail.com

Modified:
  head/devel/distcc/Makefile
  head/devel/distcc/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/distcc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/distcc/Makefile	Wed Jan  2 22:47:32 2013	(r309847)
+++ head/devel/distcc/Makefile	Wed Jan  2 23:15:32 2013	(r309848)
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	distcc
 PORTVERSION=	3.1
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTREVISION=	4
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 
@@ -89,6 +89,7 @@ DOC_FILES=	AUTHORS INSTALL NEWS README \
 do-install:
 	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/distcc ${PREFIX}/bin
 	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/distccmon-text ${PREFIX}/bin
+	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/lsdistcc ${PREFIX}/bin
 .if defined(WITH_GNOME) || defined(WITH_GTK)
 	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/distccmon-gnome ${PREFIX}/bin
 .endif

Modified: head/devel/distcc/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/distcc/pkg-plist	Wed Jan  2 22:47:32 2013	(r309847)
+++ head/devel/distcc/pkg-plist	Wed Jan  2 23:15:32 2013	(r309848)
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 @comment $FreeBSD$
 bin/distcc
 bin/distccmon-text
+bin/lsdistcc
 %%WITH_GNOME%%bin/distccmon-gnome
 sbin/distccd
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/AUTHORS
